productDisplayName: Baggit Women Parinacrush Olive Mobile Pouch
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards, mobile phone and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish mobile pouch from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or convert it to a sling bag with the shoulder strap. Dimensions: 11 cm x 12 cm Created from genuine leather and jute overlays Synthetic shoulder strap Foldable flap with a magnetic button closure and a zippered compartment inside One main zippered compartment with a zippered pocket at the back Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
